title: Security Attack Source IP Analysis
description: Top attacking IPs across both applications with attack type distribution and severity breakdown. Enables IP-based threat intelligence correlation and firewall rule recommendations.
query: 'Log Source' in ('enterprise-crm-portal', 'octo-drone-shop', 'SOC Application Logs') and 'security.attack.detected' = true | stats count as Attacks, distinctcount('security.attack.type') as UniqueAttackTypes, unique('security.attack.type') as AttackTypes, distinctcount('service.name') as TargetedServices by 'security.source_ip' | sort -Attacks | head 25
